Knowledge Agent

Document Intelligence Agent

A Document Intelligence Agent reads your contracts, invoices, and reports — extracts key fields, answers questions across document sets, flags anomalies, and compares documents against templates. What takes a paralegal 3 hours takes this agent 3 minutes.

FAQ

Common questions about Document Intelligence Agent.

What types of documents can it process?
Contracts (NDAs, service agreements, vendor contracts), invoices, POs, financial reports, insurance policies, property documents, lab reports. PDFs, Word docs, and scanned documents with OCR.
Can it compare documents?
Yes. 'Compare this NDA with our standard template and highlight deviations' is a typical use case. Outputs a list of differences with section references.
How accurate is the data extraction?
95–98% for clean digital invoices. 85–92% for unstructured documents. Low-confidence fields are flagged for human review, not entered automatically.
Can it flag unusual clauses in contracts?
Yes. You define what 'unusual' means for your business — non-standard payment terms, liability caps below a threshold, IP assignment clauses. The agent flags any section matching your risk criteria.
What about data security?
Documents are processed in your cloud environment. Nothing leaves your infrastructure. We set up the system on your GCP, AWS, or Azure account — you own the data.

Ready to deploy Document Intelligence Agent?

Book a 30-minute discovery call.
